title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Godrej Appliances

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Godrej Appliances
jsonLd.description:
We at Godrej Appliances are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Allahabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Godrej Appliances:
Godrej Appliances is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Appliances!
